name: get_issue
description: Fetch a single issue by number from a GitHub repository. Returns the full issue body, state, labels, assignees, and comment count.

repo.description: Repository name without the owner prefix

issue_number.description: Numeric issue identifier within the repository

name: create_issue
description: Open a new issue in a GitHub repository. Supports title, body, labels, assignees, and an optional milestone.

repo.description: Repository name without the owner prefix

title.description: Short issue title shown in lists and notifications

body.description: Full Markdown body of the issue

labels.description: Labels to attach to the new issue

assignees.description: Logins of users to assign to the issue

name: update_issue
description: Modify an existing issue's title, body, labels, assignees, or state. Only provided fields are changed; omit fields you do not want to touch.

repo.description: Repository name without the owner prefix

issue_number.description: Numeric issue identifier within the repository

title.description: New issue title, if you want to rename it

state.description: Target state to move the issue to

name: add_issue_comment
description: Post a comment on an existing GitHub issue or pull request. Body is parsed as GitHub-flavored Markdown.

repo.description: Repository name without the owner prefix

issue_number.description: Issue or pull request number to comment on

name: list_issues
description: List open or closed issues in a repository with filtering by label, assignee, milestone, and date. Paginates 30 issues at a time by default.

repo.description: Repository name without the owner prefix

labels.description: Return only issues carrying every label in this list

name: get_pull_request
description: Fetch a pull request's full metadata including branches, merge status, review decision, and commit head SHA.

repo.description: Repository name without the owner prefix

pull_number.description: Pull request number within the repository

name: create_pull_request
description: Open a new pull request from a head branch to a base branch. Optionally marks it as a draft and enables maintainer edits.

repo.description: Repository name without the owner prefix

title.description: Pull request title; keep it short and descriptive

base.description: Branch the changes should be merged into

draft.description: If true, open the PR as a draft

name: merge_pull_request
description: Merge a pull request using the specified merge method. Fails if the PR is not mergeable or has unresolved required reviews.

repo.description: Repository name without the owner prefix

merge_method.description: Merge strategy to apply to the pull request

commit_title.description: Override for the merge commit title

name: get_pull_request_files
description: List files changed in a pull request with additions, deletions, and patch fragments. Paginates large diffs.

repo.description: Repository name without the owner prefix

pull_number.description: Pull request number within the repository

per_page.description: Number of file entries per page (1-100)

name: list_commits
description: List commits on a branch in a repository, most recent first. Supports filtering by author, path, and date window.

repo.description: Repository name without the owner prefix

sha.description: Branch name or commit SHA to start listing from

path.description: Restrict the list to commits touching this path

since.description: Only commits after this ISO 8601 timestamp

name: create_branch
description: Create a new branch in a repository starting from a base branch or commit. Fails if the target name already exists.

repo.description: Repository name without the owner prefix

branch.description: Name of the new branch to create

from_branch.description: Existing branch or SHA to branch off from

name: get_file_contents
description: Read the contents of a file or list the entries of a directory at a specific ref in a GitHub repository.

repo.description: Repository name without the owner prefix

path.description: Path to the file or directory within the repository

ref.description: Branch name, tag, or commit SHA (defaults to the default branch)

name: create_or_update_file
description: Create a new file or update an existing file in a repository via a single commit. Requires the current blob SHA when updating.

repo.description: Repository name without the owner prefix

path.description: Path within the repository to write

content.description: File contents encoded as a UTF-8 string

branch.description: Branch to commit onto (defaults to the default branch)

sha.description: Current blob SHA of the file; required when updating

name: search_code
description: Search code across public and accessible GitHub repositories using the full GitHub code search syntax.

query.description: Code search query using GitHub qualifiers (repo:, path:, language:)

page.description: Page number of results to return

name: search_repositories
description: Search for repositories on GitHub using stars, languages, topics, and other qualifiers. Returns name, description, and stats.

query.description: Repository search query, e.g. topic:llm language:rust stars:>100

sort.description: Sort axis for the result list
